scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --help && node dist/cli.js doctor --json --cwd fixtures/next-basic; test $? -eq 2
scripts.smoke:mcp: npm run build && printf '%s\n%s\n' '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-06-18","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"smoke","version":"0"}}}' '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | node dist/cli.js mcp | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{for (const name of ["plan_provisioning","estimate_cost","deploy_preview","audit_env","plan_secrets"]) if(!s.includes(name)) process.exit(1);})'
scripts.smoke:auth: npm run build && node dist/cli.js add auth better-auth --db d1 --orm drizzle --dry-run --json --cwd fixtures/next-basic | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(s); const counts={}; for (const c of j.changes) counts[c.path]=(counts[c.path]||0)+1; if(Object.values(counts).some(n=>n>1)) process.exit(1); if(!j.changes.some(c=>c.path==="app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts")) process.exit(1);})'
scripts.test: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:exec && npm run smoke:mcp && npm run smoke:auth && npm run smoke:addons && npm run smoke:deploy-cost && npm run smoke:redact && npm run smoke:compose && npm run smoke:providers && npm run smoke:byebye && npm run smoke:env-migrate && npm run smoke:agent-loop && npm run smoke:openai-batch && npm run smoke:menu && npm run smoke:cloudflare && npm run smoke:user-addons && npm run smoke:rollback && npm run smoke:remote-addons
